next_steps: Biopsy of retroperitoneal or periaortic soft tissue for histopathology and immunohistochemical staining
BRAF V600E mutation testing on biopsy tissue
Brain MRI with attention to the hypothalamic-pituitary region
Skeletal survey or long bone radiographs to assess for osteosclerosis
PET-CT scan for disease staging and to identify active sites for biopsy
Endocrine testing for central diabetes insipidus including serum and urine osmolality
